name: QingCloud
description: Full-stack Chinese cloud (青云QingCloud) offering public/private cloud, KubeSphere container platform, AI infrastructure. STAR Market-listed.

seo.title: QingCloud — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: QingCloud: Full-stack Chinese cloud (青云QingCloud) offering public/private cloud, KubeSphere container platform, AI infrastructure. STAR Market-listed.

when_to_use: Full-stack Chinese cloud with compute, storage, and AI services
KubeSphere-native Kubernetes platform for Chinese enterprises
GPU cloud for AI training with Chinese data residency
Private cloud deployment on QingCloud's OpenStack-based stack
Enterprise AI infrastructure for Chinese manufacturing and finance

review.verdict: Credible mid-tier Chinese cloud, especially if you want KubeSphere, but not a global player.
review.best_for: Chinese enterprises wanting private cloud plus KubeSphere from a listed vendor
review.not_for: Global teams or anyone needing hyperscaler-grade AI and serverless services
